message:
fix: secure blob access and optimize upload deduplication

- Require authentication for all blob access (GET and HEAD)
- Validate user owns a transcript containing the blob before serving
- Verify blob SHA256 on upload to prevent content-address spoofing
- Add HEAD endpoint for clients to check blob existence
- Skip uploading blobs that already exist on server

🔮 View transcript: https://vibeinsights.dev/s/b0516d4b-5643-4671-8bd6-de8b8ba61e93
